name: Batch
description: Batch — Mobile push notification and in-app messaging platform with segmentation, A/B testing, and transactional message APIs.

seo.title: Batch — Push / In-app Messaging SDK
seo.meta_description: Batch: Batch — Mobile push notification and in-app messaging platform with segmentation, A/B testing, and transactional message APIs.

when_to_use: Transactional + marketing push with behavioral segmentation SDK
A/B testing push notification copy and send-time for mobile apps
In-app messaging for onboarding flows tied to user lifecycle events
Triggered push campaigns based on real-time user actions in app

pros: Strong EU/GDPR posture with data residency
Reliable push delivery with decent segmentation
Transactional API is simple and well-documented
A/B testing built into campaign flows
cons: Mobile-centric — web push support is secondary
Smaller ecosystem than Braze or OneSignal
UI can feel slow on large audience queries
review.verdict: Credible EU alternative to Braze for mobile push, but feels lightweight for full-stack CRM use cases.
review.best_for: European mobile apps wanting GDPR-native push with segmentation
review.not_for: Teams needing email, SMS, and in-app in one mature suite
